task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. The tag 'to-read' does not yet exist in the library.

Create a new tag named exactly 'to-read' (lowercase, with a hyphen) and assign it to the item titled 'Attention Is All You Need'. After saving, the tag 'to-read' must exist in the library and must be assigned to that item. Leave Zotero running.

verification.command: check-item-tag 'Attention Is All You Need' to-read
verification.description: Attention Is All You Need item has tag 'to-read'
